ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Mar-09-2022 Continued To Apr-06-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rowena Navia, via ZOOM, for Elizabeth Ho, Administrator.

Ms. Navia reports that she has forwarded a draft of a status petition to the Administrator for her signature, and it should be ready to file soon and requests a two-week continuance.

The Status hearing is continued to Apr-06-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Andam. Not reported.
